_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Bun Egg
author: ky@kyvrixon.dev
description: Bun is an incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, transpiler bundler, and npm package manager all-in-one.
startup: set -euo pipefail; [[ "${USING_GIT:-0}" == "1" && -d .git && "${AUTO_UPDATE:-0}" == "1" ]] && git pull; [[ -n "${RMBUN_PACKAGES:-}" ]] && bun remove ${RMBUN_PACKAGES}; [[ -f /home/container/package.json ]] && ${INSTALL_DEPS_CMD}; ${START_CMD}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

banner() {
    echo "-----------------------------------------"
    echo "$1"
    echo "-----------------------------------------"
}

genhome() {
    local base="/home/container/"
    if [[ $1 ]]; then
        echo "$base$1"
    else
        echo "$base"
    fi
}

sync_git() {
    local base="$1"
    if [[ -d "$base/.git" && -f "$base/.git/config" ]]; then
        local origin
        origin=$(git -C "$base" config --get remote.origin.url)
        if [[ "$origin" == "$GIT_ADDRESS" ]]; then
            echo "Origin match found. Pulling latest changes..."
            git -C "$base" pull
        else
            echo "Origin mismatch. Skipping pull to avoid conflicts."
        fi
    else
        echo "Cloning repository..."
        if [[ -z "${BRANCH:-}" ]]; then
            git clone "$GIT_ADDRESS" "$base"
        else
            git clone --single-branch --branch "$BRANCH" "$GIT_ADDRESS" "$base"
        fi
    fi
}

install_deps() {
    local base="$1"
    if [[ ${INSTALL_DEPS:-0} == "1" && -n "${INSTALL_DEPS_CMD:-}" && -f "$base/package.json" ]]; then
        echo "Executing: ${INSTALL_DEPS_CMD}"
        (cd "$base" && ${INSTALL_DEPS_CMD})
    else
        echo "Dependency installation skipped."
    fi
}

# =========================
# Main script
# =========================
base=$(genhome)

banner "Starting Installation Process"

echo "Updating package lists..."
apt update -y -qq > /dev/null

echo "Installing system dependencies..."
packages=(git curl jq file unzip make gcc g++ python3 ${OS_PACKAGES:-})
apt install -y -qq "${packages[@]}" > /dev/null

echo "Cleaning up apt cache..."
rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/* > /dev/null

banner "Configuring Workspace"

echo "Navigating to $base..."
mkdir -p "$base"
cd "$base"

if [[ ${USER_UPLOAD:-0} == "1" ]]; then
    echo "User upload detected. Skipping Git synchronization."
    exit 0
fi


[[ "$GIT_ADDRESS" != *.git ]] && GIT_ADDRESS="${GIT_ADDRESS}.git"

if [[ -n "${USERNAME:-}" || -n "${ACCESS_TOKEN:-}" ]]; then
    echo "Configuring Git credentials..."
    GIT_URL_PATH=$(echo "$GIT_ADDRESS" | cut -d/ -f3-)
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@${GIT_URL_PATH}"
else
    echo "Using anonymous Git access"
fi

banner "Synchronising Source Code"
sync_git "$base"

banner "Installing Dependencies"
install_deps "$base"

banner "Installation Complete!"

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository url to clone from

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Git access token for authentication (personal access token)

variables.name: Auto Update
variables.description: Pull the latest files on startup? Requires "Using Git?" to be enabled

variables.name: Additional Bun Packages
variables.description: Install additional bun packages separated with a space

variables.name: Uninstall Bun Packages
variables.description: Uninstall bun packages separated with a space

variables.name: Extra OS Packages
variables.description: ⚠️(Requires server reinstall): Extra packages to be installed alongside the system separated with a space.

variables.name: Install Dep Command
variables.description: The command to be ran when installing deps
